9-sinif.title: 9th Grade
9-sinif.description: 2 weekend days + 1 weekday. Total 14 lesson hours. Kunduz, Baykuş library, one-on-one Q&A and guidance.
9-sinif.hero_quote: A strong foundation at the start of high school is the key to great YKS success.
9-sinif.intro: Students attend classes 2 days on weekends (Saturday afternoon/Sunday morning or Saturday morning/Sunday afternoon) and 1 weekday.
9-sinif.body: Students attend classes 2 days on weekends (Saturday afternoon/Sunday morning or Saturday morning/Sunday afternoon) and 1 weekday. Total 14 lesson hours. Kunduz program, Baykuş library (09:00-19:00), one-on-one question solving, monthly mock exams and AI-powered analyses. Individual program and tracking by the guidance unit. Exam preparation, motivation and speed reading activities. Summer, mid-term and semester break camps.
9-sinif.phase1_text: One-on-one question solving and teacher support anytime via the Kunduz program.
9-sinif.phase2_text: Monthly mock exams and AI-powered analyses for gap identification and personalized question bank creation.
9-sinif.phase3_text: Individual program and tracking by the guidance unit. Exam preparation, motivation activities. Summer, mid-term and semester break camps.
9-sinif.result_text: Strong foundational knowledge, exam habits and a ready start toward the YKS process.
9-sinif.tech_intro: 2 days on weekends and 1 day on weekdays. Total 14 lesson hours.
9-sinif.tech_tools: Kunduz program · Baykuş library · One-on-one Q&A · Guidance
9-sinif.meta_description: Comprehensive 14-hour-per-week program with Kunduz, Baykuş library and guidance for 9th grade students.

11-sinif.title: 11th Grade
11-sinif.description: 2 weekend days + 2 weekdays. Total 16 lesson hours. YKS-focused comprehensive prep, individual guidance and university visits.
11-sinif.hero_quote: 11th grade is the critical year when the building blocks of YKS success are laid.
11-sinif.intro: 2 weekend days + 2 weekdays. Total 16 lesson hours.
11-sinif.body: 2 weekend days + 2 weekdays. Total 16 lesson hours. One-on-one question solving, Kunduz, Baykuş library (7 days 09:00-19:00). Weekly individual guidance and parent updates. YKS-focused motivation activities, mock exam rehearsals, AI-powered question bank creation. University visits and introductions. Camps (Summer, mid-term, semester break).
11-sinif.phase1_text: One-on-one question solving, Kunduz program and Baykuş library (7 days 09:00-19:00) for uninterrupted support.
11-sinif.phase2_text: Mock exam rehearsals and AI-powered question bank creation for gap analysis.
11-sinif.phase3_text: Weekly individual guidance, parent updates, university visits and camp programs.
11-sinif.result_text: Entering YKS with strong preparation and taking solid steps toward the target university.
11-sinif.tech_intro: 2 days on weekends and 2 days on weekdays. Total 16 lesson hours. 7-day library access.
11-sinif.tech_tools: One-on-one Q&A · Kunduz · Baykuş library · AI analysis

mezun.title: Graduate
mezun.description: 4 weekdays. Total 20 lesson hours. Weekly mock exam, AI-analyzed question bank and individual guidance.
mezun.hero_quote: Preparing for YKS one more year is not starting over — it is continuing stronger.
mezun.body: 4 weekdays. Total 20 lesson hours. One-on-one question solving, Kunduz, weekly mock exam and AI-analyzed question bank. Baykuş library (7 days 09:00-19:00). Weekly individual guidance and parent tracking. YKS-focused camps and motivation activities.
mezun.phase1_text: One-on-one question solving, Kunduz program and Baykuş library (7 days 09:00-19:00) for uninterrupted support.
mezun.phase2_text: Weekly mock exams and AI-analyzed question bank for gap identification and resolution.
mezun.phase3_text: Weekly individual guidance, parent tracking and YKS-focused camp programs.
mezun.result_text: Achieve the target YKS score and secure admission to the desired university and department.

mezun.tech_intro: 4 weekdays. Total 20 lesson hours. Weekly mock exam and AI-analyzed question bank.

deneme-kulubu.title: Mock Exam Club
deneme-kulubu.description: Regular YKS mock exams, net analysis and peer learning. Open to all grade levels.
deneme-kulubu.hero_quote: Every mock exam takes you one step forward.
deneme-kulubu.intro: The Mock Exam Club aims to provide regular exam experience to all students. Weekly YKS format mock exams and detailed net analysis.
deneme-kulubu.body: Students continuously improve through group evaluation sessions and peer learning.
deneme-kulubu.phase1_text: Full weekly mock exams in YKS format. Practice under real exam conditions.
deneme-kulubu.phase2_text: Topic-based net analysis after mock exams, individual review of incorrectly answered questions.
deneme-kulubu.phase3_text: Group sessions where students evaluate together and peer learning.
deneme-kulubu.result_text: Continuously increasing net score, exam habits and strengthened confidence.
deneme-kulubu.tech_intro: Weekly mock exams in YKS format. Analysis sessions included.
deneme-kulubu.tech_tools: Weekly mock exam · Net analysis · Group evaluation · Progress tracking
deneme-kulubu.meta_title: Mock Exam Club | Şirinevler Final Academy
deneme-kulubu.meta_description: Weekly YKS format mock exams, net analysis and group evaluation.

rehberlik.title: Guidance
rehberlik.description: One-on-one psychological and academic guidance for career planning, motivation and exam anxiety.
rehberlik.hero_quote: Success comes with working in the right direction. Our guidance program helps you determine the direction.
rehberlik.intro: Our guidance program is a comprehensive counseling service that supports academic and personal development. Exam anxiety, career planning and parent communication are conducted together.
rehberlik.body: The process is transparently monitored through one-on-one sessions and regular parent reports.
rehberlik.phase1_text: One-on-one counseling on goal setting, field selection and creating a study plan.
rehberlik.phase2_text: Expert support for exam anxiety, low motivation and stress management.
rehberlik.phase3_text: Regular parent meetings and student progress reports.
rehberlik.result_text: Students with high confidence, goal-oriented focus and strong motivation.
rehberlik.tech_intro: One-on-one meeting opportunity with an expert teacher and counselor staff.
rehberlik.tech_tools: One-on-one sessions · Career plan · Parent report · Motivational support
rehberlik.meta_description: One-on-one guidance for career planning, exam anxiety management and motivation.

12-sinif-vip.title: 12th Grade VIP
12-sinif-vip.description: 16 lesson hours, 40 hours of private tutoring, 2 mock exams per week. Low class sizes with VIP class advantage.
12-sinif-vip.hero_quote: In this final year before YKS, every student deserves individual attention — our VIP program delivers exactly that.
12-sinif-vip.intro: 2 weekend days + 2 weekdays. Total 16 lesson hours. 40 hours of private tutoring entitlement.
12-sinif-vip.body: 2 weekend days + 2 weekdays. Total 16 lesson hours. 40 hours of private tutoring entitlement. 2 mock exams per week and AI-powered analysis. VIP class advantage: Premium services and low class sizes. One-on-one question solving, Kunduz, Baykuş library (7 days 09:00-19:00). Weekly individual guidance and parent updates. YKS-focused motivation activities, mock exam rehearsals, AI-powered question bank creation. University visits and introductions. Camps (Summer, mid-term, semester break).
12-sinif-vip.phase1_text: Low class sizes with 16 lesson hours/week. Individual attention and 40 hours of private tutoring per year.
12-sinif-vip.phase2_text: 2 YKS mock exams per week and AI-powered personal question bank creation.
12-sinif-vip.phase3_text: Weekly individual guidance, university introductions and regular parent updates.
12-sinif-vip.result_text: Reaching the target score in YKS and securing a place at the desired university.

acik-lise.title: Open High School Academy
acik-lise.description: Same program as graduate groups during 12th graders' transition to open high school. 7-day library access.
acik-lise.hero_quote: For open high school students, all time is spent here — just like attending school.
acik-lise.intro: During the transition period of 12th graders to open high school, the same program as graduate groups is applied.
acik-lise.body: During the transition period of 12th graders to open high school, the same program as graduate groups is applied. Weekday classes, weekend library. All time is spent here just like attending school. 7-day library access (09:00-19:00).
acik-lise.phase1_text: Same lesson program as graduate groups. Weekday classes and one-on-one question solving.
acik-lise.phase2_text: Study at the Baykuş library 7 days a week from 09:00 to 19:00. Weekend library access.
acik-lise.phase3_text: All time is spent here just like attending school. Same guidance and tracking system as graduate groups.
acik-lise.result_text: Achieve the target YKS score and secure admission to the desired university.
acik-lise.tech_intro: Same program as graduate groups. Weekday classes, weekend library. Full-day learning environment.
acik-lise.tech_tools: Graduate group program · 7-day library · One-on-one Q&A · Guidance

ozel-ders.title: Private Tutoring
ozel-ders.description: Fully personalized one-on-one lessons with expert instructors, tailored to each student's needs.
ozel-ders.hero_quote: Every student is unique; the greatest progress lies in a program designed just for you.
ozel-ders.intro: Our Private Tutoring program provides one-on-one guidance tailored to each student's needs and is designed to maximize academic achievement.
ozel-ders.body: Our expert instructors analyze each student's strengths and areas for improvement to create a fully personalized learning plan. This enables students to better understand topics they find challenging and achieve higher performance in exams.
ozel-ders.phase1_text: The student's current level and weak areas are identified to create a personalized roadmap.
ozel-ders.phase2_text: The expert instructor prepares a one-on-one lesson plan targeting identified weaknesses and implements it with the student.
ozel-ders.phase3_text: Progress is evaluated after every session and the program is updated according to the student's evolving needs.
ozel-ders.result_text: Eliminating weak areas, improving exam performance and reaching target scores.
ozel-ders.tech_intro: A personal learning experience fully shaped around the student's needs, guided by an expert instructor.
ozel-ders.tech_tools: One-on-one teaching · Personalized plan · Expert instructor · Continuous tracking
ozel-ders.meta_description: One-on-one private tutoring program. Personalized lesson plans with expert instructors.

About.meta_description: A well-established educational institution. Experienced teachers, individual tracking and proven YKS results.
About.title: About Us
About.subtitle: YKS Education in Şirinevler
About.content: Şirinevler Final Academy was founded with the aim of providing quality YKS preparation education to students in the region. Over the years, we have helped thousands of students reach their target universities.

vision.title: Vision
vision.text: To be a trusted educational home where students in Şirinevler and surrounding areas can access quality education in the easiest and most effective way.

mission.title: Mission
mission.text: To support every student in discovering their potential and reaching their academic goals. To make a difference with quality education, individual tracking and strong motivation.

founder.text: Quality in education is not a destination but an endless pursuit that continues in every student.

Contact.meta_description: Contact us for a free consultation. 0 (212) 551 72 73 — sirinevlerfinalozelogretim@abdkurumlari.com
Contact.title: Contact
Contact.subtitle: Reach out for any questions. We'll get back to you right away.

items.name: Elif K.
items.text: With the support I received throughout 12th grade, I reached my target score in YKS. Our teachers were truly very attentive.

items.name: Yusuf E. (Parent)
items.role: Son will study medicine via YKS
items.text: My son studied here and won a place at Cerrahpaşa Medical Faculty. We were amazed by the individual attention.

items.name: Selin T.
items.text: Thanks to the Mock Exam Club, my exam anxiety went away and I entered YKS with confidence. The guidance service was invaluable.

items.name: Kerem A.
items.text: Thanks to the weekly mock exams and individual analysis, I felt ready for YKS. It was a wonderful process.

items.name: Zeynep B. (Parent)
items.role: Daughter won Koç University Law via YKS
items.text: My daughter prepared here. Both academic and psychological support were excellent.

items.name: Arda Y.
items.text: I joined the program. Thanks to the intensive schedule and personalized lessons, I got into my target university.

items.name: Melis G. (Parent)
items.role: Daughter studying at Hacettepe Medical via YKS
items.text: The teachers' individual attention to each student amazed us. My daughter gained confidence in a very short time.

items.name: Can S.
items.text: The detailed mock exam analyses helped me identify and close the gaps in my knowledge. I got a great result in YKS.
